content: Hey, I'm trying to learn good team line ups for Traphase (Posse and Wheels as well) I don't have a lot but would still like to participate if anyone would be down to assist

In general though the good units right now are caecus, lilly, alva , helot, liz and clem

up to 50 different characters in the game
Cool story brother
Tbh, blame the devs
I was kind of creative before
With my alva team
But they nerfed everyone else
So now people copy alva team or make alva variations
And let's not talk about clem who can bleed 15 stack AoE with only a 1 cost
You dupe it with either reunion or lone seed and you can force discard the cleanser's card with a 2 cost
I think once the characters i mentioned get some nerfs the meta will be more diverse
Although doresain might just take over
I still see him a lot in the 2k-3k zone

Also, before i quit, i often saw only hameln + tawil + agrippa + gdoll
Or helot + tulu + winkle + nautila
Or tulu + erica + gramona + 24
There was 0 originality in the first place
Yea, balance has always been a bit rough
But hopefully we're inching closer  to a mostly viable roster

Also i forgot to mention that disgusting lotan + cassiah rng gaming + thais + winkle

Because you tried to be creative

as it should honestly, buffing less used and nerfing more used characters is one easy way to keep people changing their teams and interacting with more ways to play

(considering that more used or less used to a certain statistic is often always going to be because they are less useful/consistent and more useful/considtent since the majority will always play to win)
